content: Cancellation policy: Bookings cancelled more than 24 hours before the start time receive a full refund of the deposit. Bookings cancelled within 24 hours of the start time forfeit the deposit (50% of the total booking fee). No-shows forfeit the deposit. To cancel, contact us via WeChat, phone, or through the booking platform.

Deposit policy: A deposit of 50% of the total booking fee is required at the time of booking. Example: a 2-hour PS5 session at CNY 58/hr totals CNY 116; the deposit is CNY 58. The remaining balance is paid on arrival. Deposits are collected via WeChat Pay, Alipay, or card.

Refund policy: Deposits are refunded in full for cancellations made more than 24 hours before the session start time. Refunds are processed within 3 business days to the original payment method. No refund is issued for cancellations within 24 hours or no-shows.

Outside food and beverages policy: Outside food and beverages are not permitted in the lounge. Snacks, drinks, and light meals are available for purchase from our in-house menu. Sealed water bottles (500 mL or smaller) are the only outside beverages allowed. Violations may result in an additional cleaning fee.

Age limit policy: PlayDesk is open to all ages during daytime hours (before 8:00 PM). From 8:00 PM onwards, guests under 16 years of age must be accompanied by a parent or legal guardian (aged 18 or above). Guests aged 16 and above may visit unaccompanied at any hour.

General conduct policy: Guests are expected to treat equipment with care. Damage to controllers, displays, or furniture may result in repair or replacement fees. Excessive noise that disturbs other guests will result in a warning; repeated violations may result in removal without refund of the remaining session.
